next_steps: Esophagogastroduodenoscopy (EGD) for direct visualization and potential retrieval of gastric contents
Consultation with pediatric surgery for possible surgical removal of bezoar if endoscopic retrieval fails
Psychiatric consultation to evaluate for trichotillomania and trichophagia
Nutritional assessment to address underlying iron-deficiency anemia
Close monitoring of hemodynamic status and electrolyte balance
